title: Camcord
body:
Play through a VHS Filter!

Camcord is a simple mod that adds a VHS-inspired filter to the game. This isn't based off of the actual inner-workings of a VHS camera and player, but it gets a stylized effect of an old camera. Activate the effect with F7.

Dependencies / Prerequisites

First of all, this is a Quilt mod, and will not work on Forge or Fabric. You can learn more about Quilt here!

There are a few mods which you need to install to play this mod.

Quilted Fabric API / QSL

Satin API

Cloth Config

Make sure you get the appropriate versions, Fabric if Quilt isn't avaliable.

Shaders / Rendering Mods

Yes, this does in fact work with mods like Iris, Sodium, Optifine, etc!

Config Options

Yes, this has some configurable options! To activate the effect ingame, you must toggle it with F7, but that can be changed in the controls menu.

Fisheye Zoom - Zooms out the screen. Bigger values zoom out.

Fisheye Scale - Scales out the screen. Bigger values scale out.

Fisheye Pinch - Strength of the fisheye effect. Bigger values have less distortion.

Near Plane - Near Plane for the Bokeh effect.

Far Plane - Far Plane for the Bokeh effect.

Boarder  - Renders the 4:3 boarder.
